Title: Door Knocking Opener
Content: Hi! I'm a property consultant helping homeowners in this area. I noticed some recent transactions and wanted to check if you might be considering a move?

Title: Cold Call Script
Content: Hello, this is [name] from [agency]. I'm calling because I saw your property listing expired. Are you still looking to sell?

Title: Handling Price Objection
Content: I understand your concern about the price. Let me show you some recent comparable sales in this area to help set realistic expectations.

Title: Follow-up Email Template
Content: Thank you for viewing the property today. As discussed, I've attached additional information about the unit and the neighborhood amenities.

Title: Closing Script - OTP
Content: Based on our discussions, shall we proceed with the OTP? I'll prepare the documents and we can meet tomorrow to sign.

Title: Punggol Prices Rising
Content: Punggol resale prices increased 5% in Q1 2025 due to limited supply and strong demand from upgraders.

Title: New EC Launch - Anchorvale
Content: New EC launching at Anchorvale in Q3 2025. Expected to attract strong interest from HDB upgraders.

Title: HDB Resale Volume Up 12%
Content: HDB resale volume increased 12% in March compared to February. Market showing signs of recovery.

Title: Cooling Measure Impact
Content: Recent cooling measures have stabilized prices but transaction volumes remain healthy. Foreign buyer ABSD increased.

Title: Hougang MRT Extension
Content: Cross Island Line extension to Hougang announced. Completion expected 2030. Will boost property values.

Title: Follow up within 24 hours
Content: Quick follow-up within 24 hours increases conversion by 40% compared to 48+ hour delays.
Action Item: Implement 24h SLA for all lead follow-ups

Title: Door knocking evening better
Content: Evening door knocking (after 6pm) gets 3x more responses than afternoon sessions. People are home and relaxed.

Title: Script too aggressive
Content: Soft opener works better than direct sales pitch. People are put off by aggressive approaches.

Title: Use CMA in first meeting
Content: Showing CMA data builds credibility immediately. Clients trust agents who show market knowledge.
Action Item: Always prepare CMA before first meeting
